designSystem.style: Dark organic minimalism with urgency-coded freshness indicators. Deep forest-green backgrounds, vibrant green primary, amber and red urgency signals, card-based layout with subtle left-border freshness rails.

screens: Home (Today) — waste stat card, urgent ingredient scroll, tonight's featured recipe, adaptive reminder banner, week preview
Pantry — searchable ingredient list sorted by expiry, freshness bars, location filter tabs (Fridge/Pantry/Freezer), scan + manual add
Recipes — freshness-ranked recipe cards with urgency badges and expiring ingredient chips, detail view with full ingredient list
Plan — 7-day horizontal date selector, meal slots per day (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner), shopping list nudge
